prompt: PowerSync Discord ticket: a Flow Power user with 'Spread Export' enabled reports the optimizer's plan showed a cheap overnight grid-charge slot, but the battery exported during that slot instead. Find where a planned charge action can be rewritten to export after the LP solve and state the conditions required.
assertions: Identifies _spread_export_schedule in optimization/coordinator.py as the post-solve override that rewrites the slot
Identifies that spread_positions includes every slot of a contiguous export-allowed run filtered only by SOC above the floor, never by the slot's original LP action
Identifies that the export-allowed mask derives from positive export prices (_positive_price_export_slots), so a contiguous run can span slots the LP planned as charge
States the gating conditions: spread_export_enabled plus a brand supporting target export power (_supports_target_export_power)
Fix outline excludes non-export/discharge original actions (preserves charge slots) from the spread positions
